name: Hostile Process Detected in a Container
notes:
This rule detects processes categorized as hostile (e.g. malware, phishing, cryptomining). 

Note: The Malware Hashes SHA reference set must be populated. The Threat Intelligence App can be used to import threat intel feeds in that Reference Set.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.Process Update Success
when any of SHA256 Hash (custom) are contained in any of Malware Hashes SHA - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Hostile Process Detected in a Container on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.Process Update Success
AND when any of SHA256 Hash (custom) are contained in any of Malware Hashes SHA - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Hostile Process Detected in a Container
Event description: This rule detects processes categorized as hostile (e.g. malware, phishing, cryptomining).
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Container ID (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
